title: betula fargesii
intro: Betula fargesii, also known as Farges' birch, is a species of birch tree native to China. This deciduous tree has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Betula fargesii include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and supporting cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of Betula fargesii include tea, decoctions, and infusions, which can be made by steeping the bark or leaves in hot water.
